goal: Make the cell membrane non-penetrable except through the top opening and a front pore entry, with the player spawning close to that pore.
changes: Changed the boundary collision mode from a sealed invisible box to TopOpenWithPoreGate.
Removed the top Y-positive blocker so players can enter from above.
Split the front Z-positive wall into left, right, bottom, and top pieces to leave a pore opening.
Kept side, back, and bottom blockers non-penetrable.
Moved the spawn to (-64, 78, 364), just outside the pore at (-64, 78, 349).
Extended the native water padding so the close outside-pore spawn still starts inside water.
validation: Deployed BuildMainCellExperience.lua into Roblox Studio through the legacy bridge.
Ran require(builder).build() and confirmed top-open pore-gated wall geometry.
result: The player now appears close to the cell surface and can enter through the front pore or from the top, while other membrane directions remain blocked.
